migration_details.correction_reason: All 10 questions originally labeled as EASY are actually MEDIUM level because they cover topics (Bolesław Krzywousty, rozbicie dzielnicowe, testament, seniorat) that are NOT in primary school curriculum (szkola_podstawowa_zpe.md) but ARE in high school curriculum (liceum_technikum_zpe.md, line 704: 'Charakteryzuje przebieg walk o tron senioralny w kontekście postanowień tzw. testamentu Bolesława Krzywoustego').

easy.action: Deleted easy file - no easy questions for this chapter per curriculum

medium.action: Migrated 10 questions from easy to medium with updated IDs (Q-RD1-E** → Q-RD1-M11-M20)
